home.hero: You don't have to know how.
home.t1: I came nervous. I left feeling like the woman I forgot I was.
home.t2: It wasn't about the photos. It was about finally being seen.
home.t3: The most liberating three hours of my life.

about.title: Vasilisa
about.subtitle: Behind the lens
about.p2: I photograph what happens when someone stops performing.
about.p3: Every woman who walks through my door carries something — a version of herself she hasn't met yet. My work is to create the space where that meeting happens.
about.p4: The session is not about poses or lighting setups. It's about trust. About the moment you exhale and stop holding yourself together.
about.p5: That's when the real image appears.
about.philosophy: Beauty is not something you perform. It's something you allow.

contact.headline: Begin here.
contact.reassurance: Your inquiry is treated with absolute discretion.
